chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-1210 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of main case 04.11.2024. Mr. Muhammad Yaseen, advocate for petitioner. Ms. Rubina Khalid, Addl. Prosecutor General along with SIP Ahmed Iqbal, SHO PS Sachal Aurangzeb and SIP Nawaz. This petition has been filed for recovery of Faiza daughter of petitioner. SHO PS Sachal present submits that the alleged detenue had appeared before the Lahore High Court and stated that she had contracted marriage out of her own freewill, then she also appeared before the Judicial Magistrate-IX, Malir Karachi where her statement under section 164 Cr. P.C. was recorded; and that further investigation is going on in FIR No.1466/2024, registered by the complainant/petitioner. In view of above, this petition is dismissed as not maintainable, the relevant Courts are already seized of the matter, the petitioner shall approach the same Court for redressal of his grievance, if any. JUDGE HANIF
